headline: Assessing Otis Worldwide (OTIS) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: What recent performance says about Otis Worldwide (OTIS) Otis Worldwide (OTIS) has seen its share price slip over the past month and past 3 months, with returns of roughly 14% and 11% declines, prompting investors to reassess the elevator and escalator specialist. See our latest analysis for Otis Worldwide. The recent 14.1% 1 month share price decline and 11.9% year to date share price return, alongside a 16.5% 1 year total shareholder return decline, suggest momentum has cooled even though...
